Description: MCU Cortex-M0+ 64MHz 128KB Flash 36KB SRAM USB DFU
RS-485 transceiver pair for full-duplex (RX path + TX heartbeat path)
Hex Schmitt-trigger inverter (2 pcs for 8 override channels, logic inverted in firmware)
Asymmetric TVS diode (one per RS-485 pair)
10k resistors (gate pull-down, override pull-up/RC, BOOT0 pull-down)
Screw terminals: 12V input, override COM/GND, 12V LOAD + GND RTN
